A low hum of obligation never fully lifts.

playable_hooks: Trade Guild currently holds the district at control 1.0 with strategic value 1.0.
Commerce flux 1.0 and social tension 0.92 show how governable or combustible the district feels right now.
2 memory anchors and 3 historical echoes mean the district keeps traces of earlier visits and public memory.
3 sprite signals are already tied to visitable POIs, hinting at collection and return-play loops.
